metadata.description: Challenges validating concurrency safety patterns introduced in the comprehensive audit: AtomicBoolean/Volatile for connection state, Mutex-based helpers, StateFlow atomic emissions, Flow cancellation safety, lazy httpClient initialization, and synchronized cache access

challenges.name: AtomicBoolean/Volatile _isConnected in Protocol Services
challenges.description: Verify that _isConnected in all 8 protocol services (Dropbox, GoogleDrive, OneDrive, FTP, SFTP, SMB, WebDAV, S3) uses AtomicBoolean or @Volatile annotation to prevent torn reads under concurrent access. Simulate 100 coroutines reading isConnected while another coroutine toggles connect/disconnect, and verify no stale or inconsistent values are observed.

outputs.name: services_tested
outputs.description: Number of protocol services tested for atomic _isConnected

outputs.name: torn_reads_detected
outputs.description: Services where torn reads of _isConnected were observed

outputs.name: volatile_annotation_present
outputs.description: Map of service to whether @Volatile or AtomicBoolean is used for _isConnected

assertions.message: All 8 protocol services must be tested for atomic _isConnected
No torn reads of _isConnected may be observed under concurrent access
All services must use @Volatile or AtomicBoolean for _isConnected

challenges.name: Mutex-Based isConnected() Helper Consistency
challenges.description: Verify that the Mutex-guarded isConnected() helper method in protocol services returns a consistent snapshot of connection state even when connect() and disconnect() are called concurrently. Run 50 coroutines calling isConnected() in a tight loop while 10 coroutines call connect() and disconnect() randomly, and verify that isConnected() never returns true after a successful disconnect() completes.

outputs.name: inconsistencies_found
outputs.description: Number of times isConnected() returned stale state after disconnect()

outputs.name: total_reads
outputs.description: Total isConnected() reads performed across all coroutines

outputs.name: total_transitions
outputs.description: Total connect/disconnect transitions performed

assertions.message: isConnected() must never return stale state after disconnect() completes
At least 5000 isConnected() reads must be performed
At least 100 connect/disconnect transitions must be performed

challenges.name: StateFlow.update{} Atomic Emission Safety
challenges.description: Verify that StateFlow emissions in protocol services use the update{} operator for atomic read-modify-write instead of direct .value assignment. Simulate 200 coroutines concurrently incrementing a counter via StateFlow and verify no lost updates. Additionally, statically verify that source code uses StateFlow.update{} rather than StateFlow.value = pattern for state mutations.

outputs.name: expected_final_value
outputs.description: Expected counter value after all increments

outputs.name: actual_final_value
outputs.description: Actual counter value observed in StateFlow

outputs.name: lost_updates
outputs.description: Number of lost updates (expected - actual)

outputs.name: unsafe_value_assignments
outputs.description: Source locations using StateFlow.value = instead of update{}

assertions.message: No updates may be lost when using StateFlow.update{} atomically
No direct StateFlow.value = assignments allowed for state mutations

challenges.name: Flow Cancellation Safety with ensureActive()
challenges.description: Verify that all Flow producers in protocol services call ensureActive() or check isActive before emit() to handle structured concurrency cancellation correctly. Cancel a Flow collector mid-stream in Dropbox getRecentChanges(), GoogleDrive getRecentChanges(), and OneDrive getRecentChanges(), and verify that CancellationException propagates cleanly without being swallowed by catch blocks.

outputs.name: cancellation_results
outputs.description: Per-service results of Flow cancellation test

outputs.name: cancellation_swallowed
outputs.description: Services where CancellationException was caught and swallowed

outputs.name: clean_shutdown_achieved
outputs.description: Whether all Flows shut down cleanly on cancellation

assertions.message: No service may swallow CancellationException in Flow producers
All Flows must shut down cleanly when the collector is cancelled
All Flow cancellation tests must pass

challenges.name: Lazy httpClient Initialization with isInitialized()
challenges.description: Verify that httpClient in protocol services uses lazy {} initialization and checks ::httpClient.isInitialized() before close() to avoid UninitializedPropertyAccessException. Simulate calling disconnect() on a service that was never connected (httpClient never initialized) and verify no exception is thrown. Also verify that httpClient is initialized only on first connect(), not at construction time.

outputs.name: services_tested
outputs.description: Number of services tested for lazy httpClient

outputs.name: uninitialized_access_exceptions
outputs.description: Services that threw UninitializedPropertyAccessException on disconnect without connect

outputs.name: eager_initialization_detected
outputs.description: Services where httpClient was initialized at construction time

outputs.name: isinitialized_guard_present
outputs.description: Map of service to whether isInitialized() guard is present before close()

assertions.message: disconnect() without connect() must not throw UninitializedPropertyAccessException
httpClient must not be initialized at construction time
All services must guard httpClient.close() with isInitialized() check

challenges.name: Synchronized Cache Access in DocumentCache and StyleSheets
challenges.description: Verify that concurrent access to DocumentCache and StyleSheets.styleSheetCache is thread-safe. Run 100 coroutines simultaneously performing get/put on DocumentCache and 100 coroutines calling getStyleSheet() on StyleSheets with varying theme parameters. Verify no ConcurrentModificationException, no corrupted entries, and that cache hit/miss counts are consistent.

outputs.name: concurrent_modification_exceptions
outputs.description: Number of ConcurrentModificationException thrown

outputs.name: corrupted_entries
outputs.description: Number of corrupted cache entries detected

outputs.name: cache_hit_miss_consistent
outputs.description: Whether hit + miss counts equal total operations

outputs.name: stylesheet_cache_safe
outputs.description: Whether StyleSheets cache survived concurrent access without corruption

assertions.message: No ConcurrentModificationException allowed under concurrent cache access
No cache entries may be corrupted by concurrent access
Cache hit + miss counts must equal total operations
StyleSheets cache must survive concurrent access without corruption
